assertions.expectation: Explains the key difference: surge upgrades nodes in-place with rolling replacement, blue-green creates an entirely new pool
assertions.reason: Response correctly explains that blue-green creates an entirely new node pool while surge upgrade upgrades nodes incrementally in-place

assertions.expectation: Recommends blue-green for this scenario due to local SSDs (data can't migrate between nodes)
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly recommends surge upgrade instead of blue-green, despite the local SSD constraint that makes blue-green more appropriate

assertions.expectation: Explains that local SSD data is lost when a node is drained during surge upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions blue-green loses local SSD data but fails to explain that surge upgrade also loses local SSD data when nodes are drained and replaced

assertions.expectation: Recommends GKE's autoscaled blue-green upgrade strategy configured with --enable-autoscaling and --autoscaled-rollout-policy (NOT surge parameters like maxSurge/maxUnavailable which don't apply to blue-green), or describes the blue-green process if manual workflow is needed
assertions.reason: Response provides surge upgrade configuration with maxSurge/maxUnavailable parameters instead of blue-green configuration with autoscaling parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses Cassandra-specific concerns: need to decommission from the ring before draining, rebuild on new nodes
assertions.reason: Response addresses Cassandra-specific concerns including proper decommissioning with 'nodetool drain' in lifecycle hooks and discusses replication and fault tolerance

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for creating the new node pool with matching configuration
assertions.reason: Response provides Kubernetes YAML configuration instead of gcloud commands for creating a new node pool

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for cordoning and draining
assertions.reason: Response does not include kubectl cordon or drain commands, only monitoring and verification commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions PDB configuration to protect the Cassandra quorum during migration
assertions.reason: Response does not mention PodDisruptionBudget (PDB) configuration to protect Cassandra quorum during the migration process
